'''lafuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olaflur|olaflur]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olaflur|olaflur]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lafuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læfiwith|læfiwith]] || [[word:læfiwij|læfiwij]] || [[word:læfiwish|læfiwish]] || [[word:læfiwi|læfiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lafufuwuth|lafufuwuth]] || [[word:lafufuwuj|lafufuwuj]] || [[word:lafufuwush|lafufuwush]] || [[word:lafufuwu|lafufuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lafuwuth|lafuwuth]] || [[word:lafuwuj|lafuwuj]] || [[word:lafuwush|lafuwush]] || [[word:lafuwu|lafuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lafufwuth|lafufwuth]] || [[word:lafufwuj|lafufwuj]] || [[word:lafufwush|lafufwush]] || [[word:lafufwuf|lafufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lafuwuthu|lafuwuthu]] || [[word:lafuwuju|lafuwuju]] || [[word:lafuwushu|lafuwushu]] || [[word:lafuwuku|lafuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lafuwuth|lafuwuth]] || [[word:lafuwuj|lafuwuj]] || [[word:lafuwush|lafuwush]] || [[word:lafuwu|lafuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lafuwuthul|lafuwuthul]] || [[word:lafuwujul|lafuwujul]] || [[word:lafuwushul|lafuwushul]] || [[word:lafuwukul|lafuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lafuwuthuthu|lafuwuthuthu]] || [[word:lafuwujuju|lafuwujuju]] || [[word:lafuwushushu|lafuwushushu]] || [[word:lafuwuku|lafuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lafuwuthun|lafuwuthun]] || [[word:lafuwujun|lafuwujun]] || [[word:lafuwushun|lafuwushun]] || [[word:lafuwukun|lafuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lafuwuthuoro|lafuwuthuoro]] || [[word:lafuwujuoro|lafuwujuoro]] || [[word:lafuwushuoro|lafuwushuoro]] || [[word:lafuwukuoro|lafuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
